name: swecircuit
description: Private development workspace for the SWECircuit executable kernel.

scripts.format: biome format --write src test schemas scripts/run-v9-dogfood.mjs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.format:check: biome format src test schemas scripts/run-v9-dogfood.mjs package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run pack:check
